property.name: Wishwood Glamping & Forestry

units.name: The Yurt
units.note: solar off-grid · walk-in eco shower · private garden

units.name: Fern Lodge
units.note: woodland lodge · private bathroom · private kitchen · free wifi

location.address: Calcott / Sturry, CT3 4NG, near Canterbury, Kent

amenities: wifi at Fern Lodge + The Hobbit
quirks: bluebells carpet the woods in April

voice.greeting_style: First name · one-line welcome · get to the point

example_replies.reply: Hi {name} — sorry, no dogs at Wishwood. We sit in protected semi-ancient woodland, so we keep it dog-free for the wildlife and the bluebells. Thank you for understanding.

policies.cancellation: Full refund up to 14 days before arrival
policies.pets: no — protected semi-ancient woodland, kept dog-free

operations.checkout_instructions: Strip beds · load dishwasher · lock door · code auto-clears at 10:00

faq.a: Around 60 Mbps — works fine for streaming and video calls.

reciprocity.trigger: post-inquiry welcome, post-stay follow-up, local guides given without ask
reciprocity.how: give useful local info before asking · free walk-guide, restaurant recc, discount for their friends · builds honest obligation

scarcity.trigger: availability posts, last-min gaps, seasonal peaks
scarcity.how: specific real dates + real numbers · never fake countdowns · 'only the weekend of the 15th left in July' not 'BOOK NOW LAST CHANCE'

social_proof.trigger: guest moments, reviews turned into posts, milestone counts
social_proof.how: specific quotes with context · reviewer type (family/couple/business), season, what they actually did that day

authority.trigger: when compared to hotels or nearby cottages, when explaining policies, when answering technical guest questions
authority.how: owner voice, years hosting, direct experience · 'we've hosted 400 stays and the log burner is the thing every guest mentions'

consistency.trigger: returning-guest outreach, loyalty prompts, direct-booking after OTA stay
consistency.how: reference their prior visit specifically · 'last November you loved the log burner · here's the same week open this year'

liking.trigger: behind-the-scenes posts, owner story, community moments
liking.how: photos of real people, pets, quirks · vulnerable admissions ('had to fix the boiler last Tuesday') · not polished, honest

archetypes.voice_signature: the Explorer speaks of THE JOURNEY (arrivals, walks, discoveries, hidden lanes) · the Lover speaks of the MOMENT (log burner glow, sunset from the garden, morning coffee in the kitchen)

freud_motivation.pleasure: warmth, sensory ease, no obligations, being cared for, cheeks-red-from-the-fire, breathing space
freud_motivation.pain_dodged: cold Sundays in cities, packed pubs with no seat, no phone signal in a chain hotel, kids climbing walls, another Airbnb that overpromises

research.active_insights_note: Populated by the Research engine · insights the buyer marks active get injected into the composer prompt · see social.html Research panel
